tool_args.label: RFK Bridge Pedestrian Walkway and Fender Rehabilitation
tool_args.raw_text: Design-Build Services for a New Pedestrian Walkway and Fender Rehabilitation at the Robert F. Kennedy Bridge - Contract RK-23D/RK-83 - Walsh Construction Co. II, LLC - $45,558,000

payload.project_name: New Pedestrian Walkway and Fender Rehabilitation at the Robert F. Kennedy Bridge
payload.description: Design-Build Services for a New Pedestrian Walkway and Fender Rehabilitation at the Robert F. Kennedy Bridge. Project RK-23D restores north walkway connection from RFK Bridge Harlem River Lift Span to Manhattan. Project RK-83 replaces and upgrades the Harlem River Lift Span Timber Fender System.

warnings: project.implementing_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Implementing agency is relation context. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

tool_args.label: Henry Hudson Bridge Electrical Power Resiliency
tool_args.raw_text: Design-Build Services for Electrical Power Resiliency, Utility and Building Improvements at the Henry Hudson Bridge - Contract HH-36 - E-J Electric Installation Co. - $34,950,000

payload.project_name: Electrical Power Resiliency, Utility and Building Improvements at the Henry Hudson Bridge
payload.description: Design-Build Services for Electrical Power Resiliency, Utility and Building Improvements at the Henry Hudson Bridge. Includes upgrading Dyckman Street substation for additional power redundancy, replacing Kappock Street substation 750KVA transformer, upgrading fire alarm systems, and electrical/mechanical upgrades to facility building and maintenance garage.

warnings: project.implementing_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Implementing agency is relation context. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

payload.description: Design-Build Services for Replacement of Tower Elevator Systems and Miscellaneous Repairs at the Marine Parkway-Gil Hodges Memorial Bridge. Replace two tower elevator systems, perform miscellaneous rehabilitation, enhance overall safety of the bridge and its two towers.
